prompt: Minimal premium microphone emblem for Verbatim, a macOS transcription app
subject: single iconic microphone mark
style: vector-friendly brand mark, editorial, refined, modern, minimal
composition: centered square composition with generous breathing room
lighting: soft dimensional shading only if needed, otherwise flat and crisp
materials: smooth enamel or glass-like edge detail
constraints: transparent background, no text, no letters, no watermark, no extra objects, must read clearly at small sizes
negative: busy detail, gradients that blur the silhouette, mascots, 3D mockup scene, photoreal background

prompt: Square macOS app icon for Verbatim built around a custom microphone emblem
subject: single microphone symbol centered in a premium app icon tile
style: luxury liquid-glass app icon, soft silver-blue frame, warm cream glow center, crisp and modern
composition: centered symbol, rounded-square icon, balanced padding, suitable for macOS dock
lighting: subtle frosted glass highlights, restrained reflections
palette: icy silver, pearl white, pale blue, warm cream
materials: frosted glass, polished enamel, soft glow
constraints: no text, no watermark, no extra objects, strong silhouette at small sizes
negative: clutter, noisy texture, neon colors, skeuomorphic clutter, multiple icons

prompt: Simplified monochrome microphone glyph for a macOS menu bar listening indicator
subject: single microphone silhouette optimized for tiny menu bar usage
constraints: transparent background, solid black shape only, no text, no gradients, no watermark, must remain legible at 18 by 18 pixels
negative: thin lines, multiple colors, decorative details, shadows, perspective
